features: HYDRATING CARE FOR DRY SKIN RELIEF: This hand and lip duo provides intense hydration with a non-greasy formula that softens and soothes dry, chapped skin while improving texture and moisture retention.
FAST ABSORBING MOISTURISING FORMULA: Lightweight and quickly absorbed, the cream and balm deliver lasting comfort without sticky residue—ideal for everyday skincare routines and all skin types.
VEGAN FRIENDLY & CRUELTY FREE BEAUTY: Formulated without animal testing, this hand and lip care set is 100% vegan-friendly, making it a thoughtful and ethical choice for personal use or gifting.

TRAVEL SIZE FOR ON-THE-GO COMFORT: Compact and convenient, this skincare set fits easily in handbags or luggage, ensuring soft lips and smooth hands anytime, anywhere—even during busy days or long journeys.
IDEAL GIFT FOR MEN & WOMEN: A beautifully packaged self-care essential, combining hand cream and lip balm in one elegant kit—perfect for birthdays, travel kits, or thoughtful beauty accessories.
